nasb.text: These are the years of the life of Ishmael, one hundred and thirty-seven years; and he breathed his last and died, and was gathered to his people.

esv.text: (These are the years of the life of Ishmael: 137 years. He breathed his last and died, and was gathered to his people.)

cnv.text: 以實瑪利一生的歲數，是一百三十七歲；他氣絕而死，歸到他的先人那裡去了。

ccb.text: 以实玛利活了一百三十七岁，寿终正寝，归到他祖先那里。

csbs.text: 以实玛利一生的年岁是一百三十七岁。他气绝而死，归到他的先人那里。
